questions.q: What is the reason for the teacher's absence?
opts: (A) He is on a vacation.
(B) He fell ill.
(C) He is on a strike.
(D) He is absent due to personal reasons.
questions.explanation: The teacher's absence is due to a strike to protest the annexation of Alsace-Lorraine by Germany. This is evident from the teacher's emotional and patriotic tone in the class.

questions.q: What is the significance of the date, 2nd February, in the story?
opts: (A) It is the birthday of the protagonist.
(B) It is the day when Alsace-Lorraine was annexed by Germany.
(C) It is the day when the protagonist's mother died.
(D) It is the day when the protagonist got married.
questions.explanation: The date 2nd February holds significance in the story as it marks the day when Alsace-Lorraine was annexed by Germany, leading to the teacher's absence and the patriotic tone of the lesson.

questions.q: What is the protagonist's reaction to the strike?
opts: (A) He is angry at the teacher.
(B) He is disappointed that he will not learn French.

(D) He is indifferent to the situation.
questions.explanation: The protagonist is excited to learn about his heritage and the history of Alsace-Lorraine, which is evident from his enthusiasm and curiosity during the lesson.

opts: (A) She is the protagonist's teacher.
